evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Maintaining technical quality of the platform and initiating improvements; Writing and reviewing SQL code with automated testing
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour-focused: explicit emphasis on technical quality, automated testing, and code review discipline.
evidence.domain_risk: Financial sector (PGGM is a pension administrator), but JD language is generic around data quality — moderate risk.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate domain risk: sector implies higher risk but JD language lacks explicit compliance/regulatory language.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Part of established BI Cluster with named tooling (dbt, Snowflake, Azure Data Factory, Collibra) in responsibilities.
evidence.jd_authorship: Building data solutions using Azure Data Factory, dbt, Snowflake, and Collibra
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager voice: named tools with specific application context in responsibilities section.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: data delivery platform; Supporting PGGM teams in leveraging the data delivery platform
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary focus is internal_data: building the platform itself and supporting internal data consumers.
evidence.autonomy_level: Supporting PGGM teams; bridging business needs with data technology
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution-oriented: role receives direction (bridge business needs) and delivers, rather than setting strategy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-infrastructure expected from the candidate.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing appears in requirements list without ownership verb — tool_listed rather than owned responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate loss aversion: operational reliability is a concern but not dominated by compliance/regulatory fear.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Maintaining technical quality of the platform
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: task is to maintain and improve existing platform, not build greenfield.
evidence.loss_aversion: Maintaining technical quality of the platform and initiating improvements — preventing platform degradation, not regulatory exposure.
